title: gentiana aspera var. pygmaea
intro: Gentiana aspera var. pygmaea is a small, alpine species of flowering plant in the gentian family, known for its small, delicate flowers and unique growth habits. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been valued for its potential to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Gentiana aspera var. pygmaea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Gentiana aspera var. pygmaea are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
